questions.title: How important is a fair and transparent decision-making process?
questions.body: How important is a fair and transparent decision-making process?

deeperDives.title: It is better to slow decisions down if that keeps the process transparent for everyone
deeperDives.body: Consider whether full transparency is worth delays when outcomes feel urgent.
